calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Proof Of Transfer To Santa Clara County
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Off Calendar

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Armon Cooper for Petitioner.

Mr. Cooper addressed the Court's concerns regarding expenses being charged to the Trust stating that allocation of disbursements and expenses of management fees are made every month, that there a total of 150 trusts, that disbursements and contributions to the pooled funds cause changes in the beginning and end of each month, and that he can provide work sheets for the last 24 months. The Court will allow the accounting, the Trustees fees and the Attorney's fees, and grant transfer of venue to Santa Clara County (subject to review of the order). The Court will set a limit of $4,000.00 for payment of Trustees fees on an ongoing basis. Status on proof of transfer was set for January 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
